_comment: Curated UN ILO ILOSTAT indicator fan-out list for econ.ilostat_indicators. 'code' is the ILOSTAT indicator id used in the per-indicator bulk CSV URL (https://www.ilo.org/ilostat-files/WEB_bulk_download/indicator/{code}.csv.gz). ref_area in those files is ISO alpha-3. Keep curated (labor analogs of the econ BLS tables) — do not fan out over the full ILOSTAT index. Indicator ids are PENDING LIVE VERIFICATION against the ILOSTAT bulk-download index.

indicators.name: Unemployment rate by sex and age (%)
Employment-to-population ratio by sex and age (%)
Labour force participation rate by sex and age (%)
Employment by sex and economic activity (thousands)
Average monthly earnings of employees by sex, economic activity and currency
Mean weekly hours actually worked per employed person by sex and economic activity
Employment by sex and status in employment (thousands)
Youth NEET rate (% of youth not in employment, education or training)
